Arundo donax, also known as Arundarbor brandisii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as the giant cane or giant reed.

The health benefits of Arundo donax include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties.
